phrases.english: Patience is the key to relief.
phrases.context: Use this when encouraging someone facing a difficult situation.

phrases.english: Learn from yesterday, live for today, hope for tomorrow.
phrases.arabic: تعلم من الأمس، عش لليوم، أمل في الغد.
phrases.pronunciation: Ta'allam min al-amsi, 'ish lil-yawm, amal fil-ghad.
phrases.context: This is a motivational phrase about embracing life's journey.

phrases.english: A little bit of knowledge is a dangerous thing.
phrases.context: Said when someone thinks they know a lot but actually knows very little.

phrases.english: The pen is mightier than the sword.
phrases.context: This phrase highlights the power of communication over violence.

phrases.english: Every cloud has a silver lining.
phrases.context: Use this to remind someone that good can come from bad situations.
